name: ?SetMaxVect@Coord2D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y to maximum float bit pattern

name: ?SetMaxVect@Coord3D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y/z to maximum float bit pattern

name: ?SetMinVect@Coord2D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y to minimum float bit pattern

name: ?SetMinVect@Coord3D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y/z to minimum float bit pattern

name: ?SetZero@Coord2D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y to zero and returns self

name: ?SetZero@Coord3D@@QAEAAV1@XZ
notes: sets x/y/z to zero and returns self
